@@ release-notes/v0.1.9.md
+## Changes
+
+- Improved Feishu webhook handling, including clearer inbound message processing, legacy signature compatibility, and action-card response formatting
+- Added the Agent binding dialog to MCP and Skills flows to make agent association clearer and smoother in the dashboard
+- Improved credential generation UX with direct copy-to-clipboard feedback
+- Upgraded Next.js to `16.2.1`
+
+## Notes
+
+- This release does not add a database migration step
+- The long-term managed upgrade baseline still continues from `v0.1.7`
+

notes_md:
## Changes

- Improved Feishu webhook handling, including clearer inbound message processing, legacy signature compatibility, and action-card response formatting
- Added the Agent binding dialog to MCP and Skills flows to make agent association clearer and smoother in the dashboard
- Improved credential generation UX with direct copy-to-clipboard feedback
- Upgraded Next.js to `16.2.1`

## Notes

- This release does not add a database migration step
- The long-term managed upgrade baseline still continues from `v0.1.7`
